gaps.gap: JD snapshot is heavily corrupted; actual role scope, AI/automation focus, seniority level, and specific accountabilities cannot be determined from provided text
gaps.mitigation: Request clean JD from source. Current evaluation based on title and department metadata alone; final assessment requires full scope clarity

gaps.gap: No demonstrated AI or automation domain expertise or transformation background in candidate profile
gaps.mitigation: Clarify whether role requires deep AI/ML technical expertise or business-driven process automation framing; candidate excels at latter if required

gaps.gap: Candidate's transformation experience is product-operations-rooted; Munich-based automotive transformation context is new domain
gaps.mitigation: Assess transferability of transformation methodology and stakeholder management skills; no auto industry required, but domain learning curve should be factored

output.summary: Strong role-family alignment: AI Process Transformation Lead sits in Strategy & Operations, matching candidate's transformation, operations scaling, and program leadership background at Google. Critical blocker: provided JD is corrupted and unintelligible; full scope, seniority, and AI/automation requirements cannot be assessed. Recommend fetching clean JD before proceeding. If role emphasizes business-driven process transformation and stakeholder execution over ML/AI engineering, candidate is well-positioned; if heavy AI/technical depth is required, gap is material.
uncertainties: JD text is corrupted (appears to be cookie consent code injection); actual role scope, title accuracy, seniority, and AI requirements unknown
Whether 'AI' in title denotes AI engineering/ML depth requirement or business AI transformation/automation process redesign
Whether automotive industry domain experience is required or transferability from Google Devices is sufficient
Candidate's Python learning stage and no production software engineering background—impact depends on JD's technical vs. strategic emphasis
